name: supplylens: 05 Watchdog

parameters.query: UPDATE expand_queue SET status='queued', started_at=NULL WHERE status='in_progress' AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' RETURNING company_name, tier
UPDATE claims SET validation_status='pending' WHERE validation_status='pending' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' AND confidence IS NULL RETURNING id

SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM expand_queue WHERE status='queued') as queued, (SELECT count(*) FROM expand_queue WHERE status='in_progress') as in_progress, (SELECT count(*) FROM claims WHERE validation_status='pending') as pending_claims, (SELECT count(*) FROM claims WHERE validation_status='accepted' AND written_to_graph=false) as unwritten_claims

notes:
Pipeline 05: Watchdog
- Every 30min: reset expand_queue items stuck in_progress >2h
- Reset orphan claims (pending >6h with no confidence score)
- Log pipeline health stats
